channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The Screen Time Maximalists Who Spend an Ungodly Amount of Time on Their Phones
item.description: As debates over social media addiction rage, people with extreme screen times tell WIRED they have no plans to cut back.

item.title: Mammotion Spino E1 Review: A Budget Pool Bot That Comes Up Short
item.description: This compact pool robot keeps its price down, but its performance doesn’t match that of more capable cleaners.

item.title: Ce routeur promet de rendre les répéteurs Wi-Fi complètement inutiles
item.description: Free inclut jusqu'à quatre répéteurs Wi-Fi 7 avec ses Freebox. Et si un seul routeur suffisait à couvrir trois étages sans le moindre boîtier supplémentaire ?

item.title: Sunderland vs Tottenham Live Streams: How to watch Premier League 2025/26 from anywhere in the world
item.description: All the ways to watch Sunderland vs Tottenham live streams online and from anywhere, as two out-of-form sides contest a vital Premier League fixture.

item.title: Are these the best-designed workout headphones ever? I used them for a month to find out
item.description: The H20 Audio Ript Ultra are designed to survive any kind of exercise — but with a few compromises along the way

item.title: Netflix condamné, Gemini Live sur les enceintes, Artemis II : l’actu tech de la semaine – L’actu tech de la semaine
item.description: L’actualité tech a été marquée dès le début de semaine par des décisions de justice lourdes de conséquences, des avancées dans l’intelligence artificielle et les dernières étapes du retour sur la Lune. Voici les articles les plus lus sur Frandroid, entre streaming, Google, Apple et Artémis II.

item.title: The 3 Best Mug Warmers of 2026: Better Than the Ember Mug?
item.description: The first rule of coffee is that it must stay hot. After weeks or even years of testing, these are the three coffee warmers that will best keep it that way.

item.title: OpenAI Says Elon Musk Is ‘Injecting Chaos’ with Recent Legal Maneuver
item.description: An amendment to a recent lawsuit could change the narrative significantly, and just weeks before trial.

item.title: The 3 reasons why VCs invest: Faith, opportunity, or evidence
item.description: You might think that some traction would make getting funded easier than no traction. You’d be wrong. I have spent the better part of a decade helping thousands of first-time founders raise their first round of outside capital, and evaluating thousands more for investment.

item.title: How to watch Snooker 900 John Virgo online (it's free) – stream O'Sullivan vs Higgins anywhere
item.description: Here's our guide on how to watch Snooker 900 John Virgo final for free from anywhere as O'Sullivan vs Higgins thrills snooker fans all over the world. Starts 2pm BST on Sunday, April 12.

item.title: Decathlon brade cette excellente trottinette électrique Xiaomi avec 60 km d’autonomie et devient une affaire en or
item.description: La Xiaomi Electric Scooter 5, la prédécesseure de la récente Scooter 6, est la version de base de la série 2025 du constructeur. Déjà peu onéreuse avant, elle est actuellement disponible à 359,99 euros au lieu de 409,99 euros chez Decathlon.

item.title: Google Displayed Polymarket Bets as News ‘In Error,’ Google Says
item.description: Polymarket bets make for intriguing and clickable "headlines" when you don't know the context.

item.title: Quelles sont les meilleures montres connectées pas chères en 2026 ?
item.description: Vous voulez une montre connectée, mais vous n'avez pas un budget extensif ? Frandroid vous propose huit modèles de montres connectées pas chères (sous les 200 euros) pour faire autant plaisir à votre poignet qu'à votre portefeuille.

item.title: The best HBO Max deals and bundles in April 2026
item.description: In April 2026, HBO Max is offering bundle deals with its service so you can stream excellent shows and movies at a discounted price.

item.title: Using AI for health questions? Here are 4 tips for the most accurate answers.
item.description: Chatbot questions about your health? Keep these prompting tips in mind when using ChatGPT, Claude and more.

item.title: Euphoria Season 3 review: It should be great. Instead, its gross.
item.description: "Euphoria" reinvents itself in Season 3, but it can't escape its worst instincts. The season premieres April 12 on HBO and HBO Max.

item.title: Nintendo offers savings with new Switch 2 Super Mario Galaxy bundle
item.description: To celebrate 'The Super Mario Galaxy Movie,' Nintendo is discounting the games it's based on if you buy them with a Switch 2.

item.title: The Audacity tears Silicon Valley a new one: Review
item.description: Billy Magnussen and Sarah Goldberg star in tech billionaire satire "The Audacity," from "Succession" writer Jonathan Glatzer.
